description: Connect to Re:amaze to sync customer support conversations, contacts, knowledge base articles, and reports for eCommerce businesses.

install_fields.label: Brand Subdomain
install_fields.description: Your Re:amaze brand subdomain (e.g. 'mystore' for mystore.reamaze.com).

install_fields.label: Email
install_fields.description: The email address associated with your Re:amaze account.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.description: Your Re:amaze API token from Settings > Account > API.
